mnemonics.title: Greedy Layerwise Training
mnemonics.content: Train each layer separately, like building a tower one block at a time.

acronyms.usage: A technique used in deep learning to train deep neural networks one layer at a time.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine building a tower one block at a time, where each block represents a layer in the neural network.

analogies.analogy: Training a neural network one layer at a time is like learning a new skill one step at a time.
